params.prompt: Create an 8-frame storyboard contact sheet for a school uniform advertisement. Use the uploaded images as references — first image is the kitchen with the August 2026 calendar on the fridge, second is the Latino boy in his Royal blue polo and khaki pants, third is the Latina mom. Build all indoor scenes in the same kitchen and home environment as the first reference image. Preserve all characters exactly throughout. Story arc: First day of school morning. Starts with the calendar. Mom gets her son ready with care. He walks out the door proud and sharp. Frame-by-frame: 01 — Same kitchen from the reference image. Camera pulls back to show the full fridge with the August 2026 calendar, 17 circled in red, X marks through previous dates. Warm morning light. No people. 02 — Same kitchen. Mom stands directly in front of the boy, hands on his shoulders smoothing his Royal blue polo. No mirror. Boy looks down at his uniform. 03 — Full body. Boy facing camera in the same home, Royal blue polo tucked into khaki pants. Standing straight, slight proud expression. Natural light. 04 — Mom kneels to boy level in the same home, both hands adjusting his collar. Her face warm and focused. Boy serious, slightly nervous. 05 — Close-up on boy face. Soft morning light. Serious, a little proud, a little nervous. 06 — Medium from behind. Mom hands zipping his backpack. He stands still, shoulders back, uniform sharp. 07 — Front door open, golden morning light flooding in. Mom in the doorway watching. Boy steps outside, backpack on, uniform sharp. 08 — Wide shot. Boy walks away down a residential LA sidewalk, head up, Royal blue polo visible from behind. Morning light. Continuity: Same boy, same uniform, same mom, same warm home throughout. Consistent soft morning light. Style: Candid documentary. Warm available light. No studio lighting. Feels like a real family not a commercial. No frame numbers, captions, broken anatomy, altered uniform colors, stock photo expressions, mirrors.
